items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower Release
items.description: Release of Revenue Operations Control Tower improvements aimed at moving Net New Revenue Attainment and Annual Platform Value Realized, anchored in automation, support deflection, and better operating transparency without creating shadow workflows and led through Unified revenue data model. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net new revenue attainment by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase pipeline quality by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Unified revenue data model with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Integration adapters and migration toolkit with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Rules-based routing engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Propensity and deal scoring with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace.
Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.
Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower API.

items.title: Demand Engine Control Tower
items.description: Release of Demand Engine Control Tower exists to Reduce handoff and attribution noise in the demand engine so marketing can create more qualified pipeline without scaling manual ops work. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase return on investment by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase marketing roi by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase expansion by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase channel expansion rate by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Stage-gated workflow orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Cross-functional approval workspace with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Forecasting and scenario planning with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Pipeline risk intelligence with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Web Workspace.
Deployed workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Mobile App.
Deployed workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Dashboard.

items.title: Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub
items.description: Release of Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub exists to Tighten intake, triage, and guided resolution so support organizations protect retention while lowering resolution drag and avoidable rework. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase customer retention protected by service by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase resolution quality by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Order-to-booking integration with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Structured handoff package with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Workflow telemetry with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released AI copilot for sales execution with domain-specific workflow improvements.
